containerStyle: background-image: url('https://dspl.innogamescdn.com/graphic/popup/contents_background.png'); background-repeat: repeat; border: 1px solid #7d510f; padding: 5px 0; border-radius: 3px; background-color: #3b2110 !important;
itemStyle: display: block; padding: 12px; color: #f0e2be !important; text-decoration: none; font-size: 14px; font-weight: bold;
